cause_analysis.narrative: Heights Retreat Salon and Spa - facial massage pedicure manicure & lash Houston TX churned on 2026-04-16 after 273 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 22-day silence starting 2025-12-30. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-12 via sms, client wrote: "I don't understand…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
